nasb.text: They took Absalom and cast him into a deep pit in the forest and erected over him a very great heap of stones. And all Israel fled, each to his tent.

esv.text: And they took Absalom and threw him into a great pit in the forest and raised over him a very great heap of stones. And all Israel fled every one to his own home.

cnv.text: 他們把押沙龍的屍體抬起來，丟在樹林中的一個大坑裡，又在上面堆起一大堆石頭。以色列眾人都逃跑，各回自己的家去了。

ccb.text: 他们把押沙龙的尸体丢在林中的一个坑里，在上面堆了一大堆石头。以色列人都各自逃回家去了。
